programme.desc: The Hub with Wang Guan covers hot-button geopolitical and economic issues, as well as interesting stories and trends in culture, education, technology and lifestyle. programme.title: The Vibe
programme.desc: The Vibe is a 30-minute TV show that runs daily on weekdays on CGTN. The content focuses on exciting new trends, fashion, and cultural topics across a range of disciplines both in China and abroad. The host presents various culture-related topics in a fun way while also doing some in-depth analysis to give viewers a fuller picture as to what is happening, and why it matters.

programme.title: Inheritors
programme.desc: Inheritors is a multi-media product from CGTN that shines a light on China’s rich Intangible Cultural Heritage. Each 30-minute TV edition is hosted by a long-term expatriate in China who has a unique understanding of the country’s culture. He or she will introduce viewers to people who are dedicating their lives to its protection, inheritance, innovation, development and promotion.

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and “accepted wisdom” to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You won’t find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today’s world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from “Prove That Climate Change Exists” to “Who Will Win the Race to Space”. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation.

programme.title: Africa Live
programme.desc: Africa Live is a news program that focuses on African issues and issues related to this diverse continent. CGTN's Nairobi-based broadcast center produces Africa Live.

programme.title: Talk Africa
programme.desc: Talk Africa is a weekly discussion show that brings the most influential voices in Africa to the world.

programme.title: Sports Scene
programme.desc: Sports Scene brings you closer to all the action from all corners of the world, with highlights from across Europe, North America and China's top sports leagues.

programme.title: Due di denarI

programme.title: Freaky Feathers
programme.desc: Worldwide bird journey: Arctic Eiders, Hawaiian albatross couples, Sri Lankan magpies, and Aussie cockatoos.

programme.title: Planet of the Primates
programme.desc: Explore our closest relatives: snub-nosed monkeys at 4,000m, macaques in hot springs, and Thai macaque feasts.

programme.title: Hummingbirds: Jewelled Messengers
programme.desc: This is the story of how hummingbirds became the ultimate creatures of the air.

programme.title: Dragons & Damsels
programme.desc: More beautiful than butterflies and better fliers than hummingbirds, dragonflies are ultimate insects.

programme.title: The Real Dingo
programme.desc: Not even the big bad wolf can touch the dingo when it comes to being feared and hated.

programme.title: Spring
programme.desc: It’s a giant leap back to life and spring time’s just the right time to welcome a new generation.

programme.title: Fall
programme.desc: The world may change, but nature has devised ingenious ways to survive and thrive whatever the season.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Light On Earth
programme.desc: Bioluminescence is everywhere—land, sea, and soil. Attenborough reveals its wonders!

programme.title: From Cubs To Kings
programme.desc: Thousands of miles from their home, a pair of tiny, new-born lion cubs are posing for tourist snapshots.

programme.title: Reasons to Love
programme.desc: Too many legs? Feathers? Tentacles as arms? Behold, there’s more to nature’s greatest than fluffy cuteness!

programme.title: Voices of Nature
programme.desc: Witness the connections developed of years that Korea’s human population have made with its wildlife.

programme.title: Beyond Borders
programme.desc: The notorious demilitarized zone of Korea has existed on the boundary of two warring nations for nearly 70 years where a tense standoff still remains. However, amidst the barbed wire fences and thousands of land mines, a unique natural wonderland from wild boar to giant hornets to rare cranes peacefully co-exist alongside the ashes of war.

programme.title: Guadalquivir: Great River, The
programme.desc: A fox leads us on a journey along the Guadalquivir, Europe's wildlife paradise, to the Atlantic.

programme.title: River In The Sky
programme.desc: Brazil has a river that is bigger than the Amazon. Yet until recently it was unknown and remains invisible.

programme.title: Giraffe: Up High And Personal
programme.desc: Giraffes, nearly six meters tall, are wonders of physiology, yet long overlooked by scientists.

programme.title: Snow Leopard & Friends
programme.desc: A moving true story about the power of nature, of motherhood, and the fragility of life.

programme.title: Fragile Forest
programme.desc: An enigmatic forest, home to South America's largest monkey and birds learning dances over 10 years.

programme.title: Wild Heart
programme.desc: Brazil's secret lies in its vast grasslands, shaped by summer storms and fire, and its least known habitat.

programme.title: Labyrinth of Lakes
programme.desc: Otters thrive in the dry season but must let the caiman take over when it becomes a vast glittering swamp.

programme.title: Paradise Coast
programme.desc: Brazil’s coast offers more than Copacabana: whales, dolphins, octopuses, and deadly snakes make it diverse.

programme.title: Flooded Forest
programme.desc: One in ten species live in the Amazon, where its size, diversity, and annual flooding create relationships.

programme.title: Follow Your Cat
programme.desc: With a scientist that specializes in cats and modern technology we follow the cat on their wild wanderings.

programme.title: You, Planet
programme.desc: An unknown yet familiar planet, this alien world is not from space – it’s you.

programme.title: Wondrous & Wild
programme.desc: A glimpse at the marvelous life on Earth, from births to deaths, joy to danger, day to night.

programme.title: The Lions Rule - Part 1
programme.desc: In summer, the Glade is a paradise in Ruaha's dry plains, always providing water and sparking relationships.

programme.title: The Lions Rule - Part 2
programme.desc: As the dry continues in Ruaha, herds of elephants arrive in the Glade.

programme.title: The Lions Rule - Part 3
programme.desc: Cubs grow quickly, learning to hunt, until one young lion begins to change, disrupting life in the Glade.

programme.title: Wonders Of Africa: What A Difference A Day Makes
programme.desc: In Africa, where giants roam and predators hunt, every day brings wonders, life, and death.

programme.title: Wild Ways of the Coast
programme.desc: Many dream of sandy beaches, palm-lined inlets, and marine life thriving across coasts and mangroves.

programme.title: Air
programme.desc: At first sight, our atmosphere seems empty. But this mantle of air is a habitat for life in its own right.

programme.title: Land
programme.desc: Viewed from space, our blue planet seems so familiar that we forget how extraordinary it is.

programme.title: Water
programme.desc: The oceans act as a driving force for local weather phenomena and global climate change.

programme.title: Wildlife Rescue - Apes, Dogs
programme.desc: Four small leopards are born, while the wild dog pack has managed to dig their way to the monkeys.

programme.title: Wildlife Rescue - Leopard, Wild Dog
programme.desc: Schalk brings a litter of wild dogs to Harnas, and for caracal Tammy a new chapter is about to start.

programme.title: Wildlife Rescue - Lizard, Leopard
programme.desc: A monitor lizard has made himself comfortable between 19 wild cheetahs.

programme.title: Wildlife Rescue - Leopard
programme.desc: One of seven cheetahs living in the enclosure near the built-up area of the farm is about to be released.

programme.title: Practice makes perfect
programme.desc: Kevin Richardson moves 27 lions and 14 hyenas, facing challenges with reluctant animals and permits.

programme.title: Precious Cargo
programme.desc: Kevin fights to relocate lions and hyenas, forming a new pride while managing hyena tensions.

programme.title: Leap Of The Lynx
programme.desc: Until five years ago, both populations of Iberian lynx were quickly fading away.

programme.title: King of the Seas - Sea Eagle
programme.desc: Germany’s Sea eagles thrive by stealing food from sea ravens, showcasing their expert poaching skills.

programme.title: King of the Mountains - Golden Eagle
programme.desc: Witness Golden eagles in aerial views, showcasing their majestic flights, and hunting skills.

programme.title: The Art of Seduction
programme.desc: Life is filled with magical moments. Some are extra-special.

programme.title: Masters of Disguise
programme.desc: Size is no obstacle for these wild magicians, from tiny insects to the mega-mammals of the African plains.

programme.title: Smart and Smarter
programme.desc: Navigation without a map? No problem. Building a fortress out of living bodies? Check.

programme.title: The Far East
programme.desc: The Amur's coastal delta is one of the richest ecosystems on earth.

programme.title: The Black Dragon
programme.desc: The Amur, or Heilong-jian, winds through Manchuria, forming a natural border between China and Russia.

programme.title: The Secret Springs
programme.desc: Follow Mongolian gazelles, nomads, and wildlife: eagles, wolves, marmots, and more in vast wilderness.

programme.title: The Loco-motion Picture
programme.desc: Watch how animals move differently, exploring nature's ways to keep creatures alive and in motion.

programme.title: The Witness is a Whale
programme.desc: The whales are the witnesses to a past of giants and also to an untold history: the clues are everywhere.

programme.title: Under Cover - Every Body Needs a Coat
programme.desc: From fur to feathers, from scales to shells – every creature has some form of characteristic outer layer.

programme.title: Carnivorous Plants
programme.desc: Scientists have recently shown that many more plants than we had ever thought are carnivorous.

programme.title: Best Eats
programme.desc: Food connects people! A feast for the eyes that spotlights the cuisines of China in a way that’s bound to set the mouths of the whole globe watering!

programme.title: Youthful China
programme.desc: The youth of a country is the future of that country. A series of documentaries focusing on the younger generation of China in which you get to see what they are achieving and what makes them tick!

programme.title: Pixel Collage
programme.desc: A well-crafted collage of selected short documentaries telling stories about all aspects of China! People, technology, culture, and wildlife, all are showcased in Internet-friendly form.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E32 - Prince William Royal Teenage Behind The Scenes
programme.desc: Who's the real person beneath all those glamorous royal photos? This intriguing documentary takes a look into the life of the young man behind the public image.

programme.title: Dropped - S06:E07 - Day in the Life
programme.desc: The raft continues to cause problems as Chris and Casey spend valuable energy trying to stay afloat. With their days in the South Pacific dwindling, the brothers have reached their breaking point'until a new discovery leaves a lasting impact.

programme.title: Dropped - S06:E08 - Bridge the Gap
programme.desc: Chris and Casey have hiked across New Zealand for weeks. Fighting for their lives has taken a toll on their emotions and abilities. They team up to hunt feral pigs, but the cache items used for survival create new challenges and deep frustrations.

programme.title: Wardens Case Files - S01:E09 - Operation Bruin and Peanut Road
programme.desc: Game Wardens dive into a challenging case with 'Operation Bruin'. Later, they share a funny tale about a decoy deer mishap in 'Peanut Road'. Wardens also reminisce about memorable investigations from their experiences.

programme.title: Wardens Case Files - S01:E10 - Strange Killings and Dog Help
programme.desc: In "Strange Killings," you'll hear about an incredible tale of chaos out in the wilderness. Then, in "Dog Help," a trusty dog lends a hand to a Game Warden. Game Wardens share some of the most memorable cases and stories from their careers.

programme.title: Close Quarter Battle - S01:E09 - Private Military Contractors
programme.desc: The practice of hiring private armies goes back to ancient times, and the mystique associated with the mercenary warrior has been the subject of many historical studies and fictional characterizations. This episode of CQB takes a more contemporary look at a day in the life of a group of civilian contractors, and how their role has evolved on the modern battlefield. Using its “sub-second” analysis techniques and intimate first-person footage, CQB reveals the backgrounds, training and equipment of today’s “soldiers for hire” and how private armies are re-shaping the way conflicts are conducted around the world.

programme.title: Close Quarter Battle - S01:E10 - Close Protection
programme.desc: From the elite ex-special forces personnel in charge of guarding heads of state in conflict zones to the two-person teams that protect CEOs in dangerous regions, modern day bodyguards must be well versed in close quarter battle techniques. An immense amount of planning and preparation is involved in each operation. From air travel, car convoys and helicopter shuttles to basic foot traffic, a close protection squad must be completely tuned to the Who, What, Where and When of any given situation. This episode of CQB focuses on the complex day-to-day and minute-to-minute operations of these elite teams and the highly developed techniques they employ.

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes - S01:E05 - Extreme Conditions
programme.desc: Conservationists capture and study Whitetail Deer in the frigid South Dakotan winter.

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes - S01:E06 - Capturing the Wild
programme.desc: Conservationists employ sophisticated tactics to capture kudu, impala, and giraffe.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E33 - Prince Edward and Sophie Rhys-Jones
programme.desc: The Real Story takes us inside a simple royal love tale. It offers a glimpse behind the scenes of how a Prince ended up falling for a girl from a regular middle-class family.

programme.title: Diana: In Search of Happiness
programme.desc: Experience an in-depth look at Princess Diana, the extraordinary woman of the 20th century. Featuring unique interviews and touching clips, this portrait captures her incredible journey to fame and her ability to overcome the emotional and physical challenges she encountered nearly every day.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E32 - Prince William Royal Teenage Behind The Scenes
programme.desc: Who's the real person beneath all those glamorous royal photos? This intriguing documentary takes a look into the life of the young man behind the public image.

programme.title: Wardens Case Files - S01:E09 - Operation Bruin and Peanut Road
programme.desc: Game Wardens dive into a challenging case with 'Operation Bruin'. Later, they share a funny tale about a decoy deer mishap in 'Peanut Road'. Wardens also reminisce about memorable investigations from their experiences.

programme.title: Wardens Case Files - S01:E10 - Strange Killings and Dog Help
programme.desc: In "Strange Killings," you'll hear about an incredible tale of chaos out in the wilderness. Then, in "Dog Help," a trusty dog lends a hand to a Game Warden. Game Wardens share some of the most memorable cases and stories from their careers.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E33 - Prince Edward and Sophie Rhys-Jones
programme.desc: The Real Story takes us inside a simple royal love tale. It offers a glimpse behind the scenes of how a Prince ended up falling for a girl from a regular middle-class family.

programme.title: Dropped - S02:E10 - Weathered and Worn
programme.desc: The brothers come up with a strategy and start approaching the bull. Halfway there, the bull gets up and starts walking toward them. It turns away just a moment before Casey can aim behind its shoulder.

programme.title: Dropped - S03:E01 - Best Moments Part 1
programme.desc: Brothers Chris and Casey Keefer look back on some of the best moments from the first two seasons of Dropped. They discuss their most unforgettable solo hunts and how the show has changed over time.

programme.title: Dropped - S03:E02 - Best Moments Part 2
programme.desc: Brothers Chris and Casey Keefer look back on some of the best moments from the first two seasons of Dropped. They chat about behind-the-scenes stuff no one has seen and give a sneak peek into what's coming up in Season 3.

programme.title: Dropped - S03:E03 - Dropped And Dragging
programme.desc: Chris and Casey Keefer, two brothers, set off on another adventure in the wilds of Alaska. They're exploring a river system that hasn't been hunted in over ten years because of predators. The journey begins slowly, with the brothers spending more time dragging their gear than floating, in a place teeming with grizzlies.

programme.title: Fight to Survive - S03:E09 - Mountain Lion Attack
programme.desc: Marine Anne Hjelle was mountain biking when she was ripped off her bike by a mountain lion. Anne fought back even as the big cat shredded her face in its jaws. Surviving the attack was only the beginning of Anne's incredible fight to survive.

programme.title: Fight to Survive - S03:E10 - Soul of a Survivor
programme.desc: Craig DeMartino examines the stories of other survivors he's met across the season. Their survival stories are all different, but Craig discovers that these survivors share more in common than you might think.

programme.title: Survival Science - S01:E01 - Lost!
programme.desc: Nick and Laura subject themselves to intense survival training with the Survival Training School of California deep in the mountains.

programme.title: Survival Science - S01:E02 - Sniper Science
programme.desc: Nick and Laura explore the variety of skills that military snipers use: marksmanship, long range shooting, detection, stalking, camouflage, infiltration, special reconnaissance and target acquisition.

programme.title: Survival Science - - S01:E03 - Surviving a Bear Attack
programme.desc: Nick and Laura test the power and speed of grizzly bears using Hollywood stunt tools to experience an attack. Also: an attempt to recreate an arrow shot that saved a man from a bear attack.

programme.title: Survive the Wild - S01:E03 - Cunning Copulation
programme.desc: Finding a mate, building a nest, and raising kids are all part of the whole reproductive behavior thing. But it’s not as easy as it sounds. First, you’ve got to sift through lots of possible partners to find the one with the best genes to keep your family line going. Nesting involves finding some space and then guarding it fiercely, while raising the little ones takes loads of energy as you have to feed, teach, and keep them safe until they grow up. This episode dives into the ins and outs of how creatures go about their reproductive business.

programme.title: Survive the Wild - S01:E04 - Battle Plans
programme.desc: Surviving in the wild often means being able to fight and win. This fighting strategy is called agonism and is used to set ranks, get resources, claim territory, and attract partners. There's no certainty in the wild, but animals that get good at agonism have a better shot at living to see another day.

programme.title: Dropped - S02:E10 - Weathered and Worn
programme.desc: The brothers come up with a strategy and start approaching the bull. Halfway there, the bull gets up and starts walking toward them. It turns away just a moment before Casey can aim behind its shoulder.

programme.title: Fight to Survive - S03:E09 - Mountain Lion Attack
programme.desc: Marine Anne Hjelle was mountain biking when she was ripped off her bike by a mountain lion. Anne fought back even as the big cat shredded her face in its jaws. Surviving the attack was only the beginning of Anne's incredible fight to survive.

programme.title: Fight to Survive - S03:E10 - Soul of a Survivor
programme.desc: Craig DeMartino examines the stories of other survivors he's met across the season. Their survival stories are all different, but Craig discovers that these survivors share more in common than you might think.

programme.title: Survival Science - S01:E01 - Lost!
programme.desc: Nick and Laura subject themselves to intense survival training with the Survival Training School of California deep in the mountains.

programme.title: Survival Science - S01:E02 - Sniper Science
programme.desc: Nick and Laura explore the variety of skills that military snipers use: marksmanship, long range shooting, detection, stalking, camouflage, infiltration, special reconnaissance and target acquisition.

programme.title: Survival Science - - S01:E03 - Surviving a Bear Attack
programme.desc: Nick and Laura test the power and speed of grizzly bears using Hollywood stunt tools to experience an attack. Also: an attempt to recreate an arrow shot that saved a man from a bear attack.

programme.title: Survive the Wild - S01:E03 - Cunning Copulation
programme.desc: Finding a mate, building a nest, and raising kids are all part of the whole reproductive behavior thing. But it’s not as easy as it sounds. First, you’ve got to sift through lots of possible partners to find the one with the best genes to keep your family line going. Nesting involves finding some space and then guarding it fiercely, while raising the little ones takes loads of energy as you have to feed, teach, and keep them safe until they grow up. This episode dives into the ins and outs of how creatures go about their reproductive business.

programme.title: Survive the Wild - S01:E04 - Battle Plans
programme.desc: Surviving in the wild often means being able to fight and win. This fighting strategy is called agonism and is used to set ranks, get resources, claim territory, and attract partners. There's no certainty in the wild, but animals that get good at agonism have a better shot at living to see another day.

programme.title: Dropped - S02:E10 - Weathered and Worn
programme.desc: The brothers come up with a strategy and start approaching the bull. Halfway there, the bull gets up and starts walking toward them. It turns away just a moment before Casey can aim behind its shoulder.

programme.title: Dropped - S03:E01 - Best Moments Part 1
programme.desc: Brothers Chris and Casey Keefer look back on some of the best moments from the first two seasons of Dropped. They discuss their most unforgettable solo hunts and how the show has changed over time.

programme.title: Dropped - S03:E02 - Best Moments Part 2
programme.desc: Brothers Chris and Casey Keefer look back on some of the best moments from the first two seasons of Dropped. They chat about behind-the-scenes stuff no one has seen and give a sneak peek into what's coming up in Season 3.

programme.title: Dropped - S03:E03 - Dropped And Dragging
programme.desc: Chris and Casey Keefer, two brothers, set off on another adventure in the wilds of Alaska. They're exploring a river system that hasn't been hunted in over ten years because of predators. The journey begins slowly, with the brothers spending more time dragging their gear than floating, in a place teeming with grizzlies.

programme.title: Fight to Survive - S03:E09 - Mountain Lion Attack
programme.desc: Marine Anne Hjelle was mountain biking when she was ripped off her bike by a mountain lion. Anne fought back even as the big cat shredded her face in its jaws. Surviving the attack was only the beginning of Anne's incredible fight to survive.

programme.title: Fight to Survive - S03:E10 - Soul of a Survivor
programme.desc: Craig DeMartino examines the stories of other survivors he's met across the season. Their survival stories are all different, but Craig discovers that these survivors share more in common than you might think.

programme.title: Survival Science - S01:E01 - Lost!
programme.desc: Nick and Laura subject themselves to intense survival training with the Survival Training School of California deep in the mountains.

programme.title: Survival Science - S01:E02 - Sniper Science
programme.desc: Nick and Laura explore the variety of skills that military snipers use: marksmanship, long range shooting, detection, stalking, camouflage, infiltration, special reconnaissance and target acquisition.

programme.title: Survival Science - - S01:E03 - Surviving a Bear Attack
programme.desc: Nick and Laura test the power and speed of grizzly bears using Hollywood stunt tools to experience an attack. Also: an attempt to recreate an arrow shot that saved a man from a bear attack.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E35 - Prince Charles At 50 Heir To Sadness
programme.desc: After Diana's death, everyone's attention turned to Charles, who was not only a widower and a dad but also next in line for the throne. This show takes a closer look at how he got along with his sons, his longtime love Camilla, and what his future might look like as King. Royal experts David Starkey and Anthony Holden share their insights.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E34 - Prince William And Prince Harry The Next Royal Generation
programme.desc: Prince William and Prince Harry, along with their friends, got as much media attention as today’s pop stars, fashion icons, and movie celebs. This documentary explores how this affected their personal lives and friendships, showcasing how they managed their fame alongside their royal responsibilities.

programme.title: Dropped - S06:E09 - The LZ
programme.desc: Chris and Casey Keefer must push to reach the LZ with a failing raft. With only a few hours before extraction, will Mother Nature get the best of them before they can get to safety?

programme.title: Dropped - S06:E10 - After the Drop
programme.desc: Back from their punishing experience in the New Zealand wilderness brothers Chris and Casey Keefer sit down to discuss the ups, downs and pivotal moments from their recent adventure.

programme.title: Wardens - S05:E01 - Never Ending Day
programme.desc: The Wardens' day starts early with an opportunity to capture a convicted game violator who has dodged the law for over 3 years. But just as one case closes another begins - forcing them to work late into the night.

programme.title: Wardens - S05:E02 - Angry Like A Moose
programme.desc: The wardens are called in to round up a 1,000 pound bully.

programme.title: Close Quarter Battle - S01:E11 - Counter Terrorism
programme.desc: Following the September 11 attacks, military presence became commonplace in New York and other American cities, and the counter terrorism forces were effectively given a “blank cheque” when it came to ensuring that another terrorist incident would never take place on American soil. This episode of CQB takes an in–depth look at who was selected to occupy elite anti-terrorist positions, what they were trained for, and how they were equipped: when opposing forces are using commercial airliners and chemical weapons, countermeasures are by necessity complicated and varied. CQB takes an intimate look at what it was like to be an officer on alert for chemical attacks in Washington DC, or an army...

programme.title: Close Quarter Battle - S01:E12 - French Foreign Legion
programme.desc: No country other than France operates an elite military force that invites foreign nationals to serve in its ranks. With a reputation for being a safe haven for individuals with questionable pasts, the French Foreign Legion is a true mercenary army that has garnered significant respect within the global special operations community. This episode of CQB examines a raid by the Foreign Legion on a small airport in Iraq during the 1990 Gulf War, exploring the nature of the Legion, how it differs from other special forces, and how it prepares for a wide variety of close quarter battle scenarios in conflict situations around the world.

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes - S01:E07 - Little Big Solutions
programme.desc: Quail and their habitat are studied in Texas.

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes - S01:E08 - Legacy
programme.desc: A family of conservationists capture and study elephants in Zimbabwe.

programme.title: Harry & Meghan: A Very Modern Romance
programme.desc: Meghan Markle and Prince Harry share similar interests and seem like a perfect match. Both have faced tough times growing up but have come out on top. Now they're winning together. This hour-long special, featuring a chat with author Andrew Morton, explores the social backdrop that makes their bold marriage fit right in with today's British Royal Family.

programme.title: Hellfire Heroes

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots
programme.desc: While on a routine sightseeing flight, a massive storm has the pilots fighting to keep their passengers safe.

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots
programme.desc: Rough seas have a couple of surfers turning to Island Air for an adventure of a life time.

programme.title: Fight to Survive
programme.desc: Hunters Adrian Knopps and Garrett Hagen venture into the remotest part of Alaska's Misty Fjord, hunting Moose and Bear. After a successful hunt Adrian finds himself trapped by a twenty foot tidal surge after Garrett fails to return with the skiff.

programme.title: Fight to Survive
programme.desc: Facing starvation, dehydration and predators from the deep, sailor Steven Callahan fights to survive not only the physical hardships, but also the mental and emotional strain of being adrift and alone in a disintegrating life raft.

programme.title: Captured: Extreme Weather
programme.desc: Humans are inclined to take the natural element of water for granted; until they witness its relentless power and destructive capabilities.

programme.title: Captured: Extreme Weather
programme.desc: A catastrophic earthquake, a mesmerizing avalanche, a destructive tornado, and an unintentional smashup derby on icy highways; our experts weigh in on these viral videos as people get caught off guard by the sudden and powerful forces of nature.

programme.title: Viral Wild
programme.desc: Witness the scary and upclose encounters with the Aquatic wildlife

programme.title: Viral Wild
programme.desc: Birds of a feather flock together

programme.title: Storm Hunters
programme.desc: From hailstorms to hurricanes and tornadoes, the Storm Hunters revisit their craziest chases and share some of the most amazing moments in extreme weather events.

programme.title: Storm Hunters
programme.desc: The Stormhunters find themselves knee deep in flood waters as historic rainfall threatens to wash them away.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: George links up with two experienced polar adventurers to explore the frigid Canadian arctic in the depths of winter. The team first uses skis to cross the fractured sea ice of Frobisher Bay, then dog teams to head north through the spectacular Auyuittuq Mountains.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: George and three side-kicks head straight into the “Bearcage”, looking to get beat up by the biggest, baddest hailstones that Texas and Oklahoma can throw at them. They find it – and their stormchasing vehicles don’t look too pretty after coming through these massive storms.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: George's exploration of the undersea world begins on a submarine in Grand Caymon.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: The “Angry Planet” team will be tracking storms through the 2009 Hurricane season, and plan to film george as he heads into a big one.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: For George Kourounis‚ ground zero for stormchasing is Oklahoma City, the capital of´Tornado Alley´.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: The Angry Planet team heads to Africa to climb the steep and very active Nyiragongo Volcano in the Congo that erupted in 2002, sending 125,000 people fleeing for their lives. Host/adventurer George Kourounis explores the bubbling lake of molten lava and investigates the risk the dangerous volcano poses to both the people of city of Goma and the Mountain Gorillas who live on the nearby jungle slopes.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: The autumn of 2006 brings hurricanes to the North Atlantic and hot dry winds fan forest fires across Northern Ontario. Host/adventurer George Kourounis has traveled to some awesome hurricanes, including Rita and Katrina, with his pal Mark Robinson. This year they stormchase in Newfoundland, site of the hurricane that pulled Mark out of a life-threatening depression.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Host George Kourounis has braved many terrifying phenomena – but none as frightening as the one he takes on in this episode: marriage! To make sure his new bride is on the same adventurous page with him, he proposes to get married on the lip of an exploding volcano, on the South Pacific island of Tanna, in Vanuatu. Before the native preacher, dressed in grass skirt and kustom garb, gets to perform the smoky vows, George descends into the erupting volcano to bring out red hot samples of the lava it is producing.

programme.title: Mission: Hurricane
programme.desc: In a 1-year span, Hurricanes Laura and Ida hit one of the most hurricane prone regions of the United States.

programme.title: Mission: Hurricane
programme.desc: In 2022, Josh chased the deadliest hurricane to strike Florida since 1935: Category 4 Ian.

programme.title: Mission: Hurricane
programme.desc: Josh relives his most harrowing moments hunting the world’s most dangerous storms.

programme.title: Mission: Hurricane

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Anche se la loro figlia era già scappata, tornava sempre. I suoi genitori erano sicuri che questa volta non sarebbe stato diverso, ma si sbagliavano.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Un chirurgo viene colpito a morte e il sospettato principale viene visto al ristorante al momento del delitto.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Un vicedirettore di una steakhouse della Florida viene pugnalato a morte. Sembra essere una rapina andata male, ma un'impronta insanguinata rivela che conosceva il suo assassino.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2000, il capocantiere Darrell North fu trovato morto nel suo rimorchio a Ft. Vale, Texas. Quando gli inquirenti arrivarono, scoprirono che era stato accoltellato 46 volte, rivelando un rapporto personale tra la vittima e l'aggressore.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: La videosorveglianza in un casinò seguì i movimenti di una giovane fino a poco prima della sua scomparsa.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Una donna fu brutalmente uccisa nella sua casa e gli unici testimoni del delitto erano i cani di famiglia. Un esperto di comportamento canino era certo che il killer conoscesse sia la vittima che gli animali e deciso a capire cosa videro i cani.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2008, l'universitaria Jenna Verhaalen fu trovata morta nel suo appartamento a Bryan, in Texas, e le emorragie petecchiali nei suoi occhi indicavano che era stata strangolata.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Avis Banks e il suo nascituro furono brutalmente uccisi. Il corpo venne scoperto dal fidanzato Keyon Pittman.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Una bambina di sei anni è scappata e si è nascosta quando ha visto sua nonna picchiata a morte, ma l'uomo l'ha seguita, picchiata e aggredita. Ha detto che l'aggressore era suo zio, che è stato condannato. Anni dopo ha ritrattato la testimonianza.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2000, Judy Southern tornò a casa dal lavoro e fu colpita da un uomo armato che aspettava all'interno.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2006, Darlene VanderGiesen ricevette e-mail minacciose e poi scomparve. Il monitoraggio della fonte delle e-mail portò la polizia a casa di Daphne Wright, dove credono sia stato commesso un omicidio.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Dopo che il sospetto fu accusato di incendio doloso e delitto, sostenne la sua innocenza ma fu condannato a 25 anni di galera. Ricorse a testi legali nella biblioteca del carcere e a programmi di scienza forense e decise di provare la sua innocenza.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 1995, la cameriera di Palm Beach Denise O'Neill venne rapita e uccisa. Il suo vicino Luis Caballero destò sospetti per il suo strano comportamento nei confronti delle troupe televisive che riprendevano il crimine.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2007, Brian e Beverly Mauck furono trovati morti nella loro casa a Graham, Washington. Con un'impronta palmare insanguinata e impronte di scarpe, gli inquirenti si focalizzarono su Daniel Tavares, che in passato aveva tatuato la schiena a Brian.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Il 12 maggio 1994, Crystal Perry fu brutalmente assassinata nella sua casa a Bridgton, nel Maine. Michael Hutchinson, 32 anni, fu dichiarato colpevole di omicidio.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Un serial killer era a piede libero e la polizia doveva trovarlo prima che colpisse di nuovo. La sua pista più promettente era insolita: un'impronta insanguinata sul corpo di una delle vittime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2003, Jason MacLennan tornò a casa e trovò il corpo di suo padre Ken disteso in una pozza di sangue.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Quando un giovane vigile del fuoco morì per quella che sembrava essere una grave malattia cardiaca non diagnosticata, la sua famiglia e i suoi amici erano devastati ma non avevano prove del delitto.

programme.desc: Una guardia di sicurezza è scomparsa dalla sua postazione senza lasciare traccia. I suoi resti furono ritrovati un anno dopo in un campeggio sperduto.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In poco più di un mese due donne che vivevano nello stesso complesso residenziale furono brutalmente uccise. Le analogie delle scene del crimine portarono la polizia a pensare si trattasse di un serial killer che covava un forte odio verso le donne.

programme.desc: La mattina prima di Natale, una studentessa universitaria fu rapita dal parcheggio del suo appartamento.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: I concorrenti alloggiano nel loft di Hell's Kitchen e hanno una notte intera per studiare il menu che serviranno la sera successiva. Durante la notte i concorrenti vengono svegliati continuamente da una sirena e su un televisore assistono alle lezioni di cucina dello Chef Cracco. Alle 8:00 i concorrenti scendono nelle cucine e Cracco mostra loro come tagliare la carne per fare il filetto alla Rossini.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Il servizio non va bene e Cracco è costretto a chiudere anticipatamente prima la cucina blu e poi la cucina rossa. I concorrenti vengono mandati nel loft e hanno 30 minuti di tempo per decidere i loro nominati per l'eliminazione. La squadra rossa nomina Lorena e Amelia, la squadra blu Andrea e Gene.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Le due squadre si affrontano in una sfida diretta sull'assaggio: i due concorrenti, bendati e dotati di cuffie, devono individuare quattro diversi alimenti solo assaggiandoli; vince la squadra che indovina il maggior numero di alimenti. La prova termina in parità, quindi vi è uno spareggio fra i concorrenti più forti delle due squadre (Lorenza e Gianluca) che determina la vittoria dei rossi. Per punizione, la squadra blu deve pulire 90 kg di pesce per il servizio, mentre la squadra rossa si gode alcune ore in un centro benessere.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Le due squadre affrontano una prova in esterna che ha luogo in una fattoria: i concorrenti devono condurre nelle stalle alcuni animali, ad ognuno dei quali corrisponde un ingrediente; alla fine le due squadre devono preparare un piatto con gli ingredienti conquistati e Cracco determina la squadra vincitrice. I blu propongono dei ravioli di zucca con pancetta, i rossi propongono un filetto di cervo; la squadra rossa vince la sfida e come ricompensa ottiene una serata alla Terrazza Trussardi di Milano in compagnia dello chef Cracco.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Le due squadre sono protagoniste di un'asta nella quale sono in palio alcuni ingredienti; per aggiudicarsi gli alimenti, ogni team ha a disposizione un budget di 4000 hells, una valuta fittizia con su stampata l'effigie di Cracco. Al termine dell'asta, lo chef Cracco annuncia che con gli ingredienti comprati bisogna preparare tre piatti vegetariani in quarantacinque minuti; per la valutazione, le due squadre nominano un portavoce (Gianluca per i blu e Lorenza per i rossi) che ha il compito di presentare allo chef i tre piatti in ordine crescente dal meno riuscito al più riuscito. La sfida viene vinta dalla squadra rossa, che ottiene come ricompensa una lezione dello chef sulla...

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Gli chef devono creare dei pasti per un Bar Mitzvah.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Gli chef hanno 20 minuti per preparare delle tapas usando gli avanzi del precedente servizio.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Il team affronta una prova del palato per identificare cibi diversi solo con l'assaggio.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: La squadra prepara un piatto speciale a base di granchio reale.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Ogni chef prepara un piatto usando 14 ingredienti specifici.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: I concorrenti fanno una gita al Borgata Hotel e Casino.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Per la prova in esterna, le squadre vengono condotti in un bosco all'interno del quale sono nascosti alcuni ingredienti. Seguendo due percorsi stabiliti, i concorrenti devono raccogliere tutti gli ingredienti che riescono a trovare e poi utilizzarli per preparare un piatto di carne alla griglia. La squadra vincitrice ha come ricompensa un pomeriggio in un centro benessere e inoltre ha diritto all'ingresso di un nuovo membro: Tommaso per i blu ed Erica per i rossi. La prova viene vinta dai blu e Tommaso entra ufficialmente a far parte di Hell's Kitchen.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Lo chef Cracco comunica alle squadre che il ristorante aprirà eccezionalmente anche a pranzo e la prova sarà proprio gestire il servizio. I clienti sono un gruppo di bambini e il menu è fatto apposta per loro (pasta al pomodoro, hamburger e patatine fritte, profiteroles) e la squadra vincitrice sarà quella che riuscirà a concludere per prima il servizio. Nonostante un iniziale vantaggio dei blu, la squadra rossa si aggiudica la vittoria e viene ricompensata con un pomeriggio all'interno di un parco acquatico, mentre i perdenti sono costretti a ripulire la sala e le cucine.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Le due squadre ottengono dallo chef Cracco il potere di creare un proprio menu da proporre ai clienti con gli ingredienti presenti in dispensa. Nel frattempo però le squadre si affrontano in esterna: all'interno di un grande ipermercato ogni concorrente deve scegliere casualmente due bandierine che raffigurano gli stemmi delle varie regioni italiane; ad ogni bandierina sono associati degli ingredienti tipici della regione, che devono essere usati per ideare un piatto che racchiuda elementi di entrambe le regioni. Lo chef passa quindi a decidere quali siano le quattro idee migliori e sceglie Sybil e Laura per i rossi e Gene e Matteo per i blu. I quattro cuochi preparano i piatti nelle...

programme.title: Il mio piccolo dinosauro
programme.desc: Il giovane Jake cresce in un borgo dove non accade mai nulla di eccitante. Un giorno il ragazzino si ritrova in camera un piccolo dinosauro blu che diventa il suo nuovo meraviglioso amico.

programme.title: Il ragazzo e il grande elefante
programme.desc: Da quando entrambi i genitori sono morti, Phoenix viene affidato alla zia Sarah, che vive in Africa con suo marito Jack. Qui rimane subito affascinato dalla natura selvaggia del continente. Durante un safari incontrerà un grande elefante con cui andrà incontro a emozionanti avventure.

programme.title: Arthur e il popolo dei Minimei
programme.desc: Come un qualsiasi altro bambino di 10 anni, Arthur è affascinato dalle storie che sua nonna gli racconta prima di dormire. I suoi sogni sono popolati dalle tribù africane e dalle incredibili altre invenzioni descritte su un vecchio libro che apparteneva a suo nonno, misteriosamente scomparso.

programme.title: Ploi
programme.desc: Ploi è un pulcino di piviere che ha paura a spiccare il volo.

programme.title: Il fantastico mondo di Aladino
programme.desc: Calvin, un giovane commesso della pizza a domicilio, viene portato nella Bagdad dell'ottavo secolo grazie al Genio della lampada. Qui, con l'aiuto di Alì Babà e della principessa Sherazade, recupererà la lampada di Aladino.

programme.title: Mr. Magorium e la bottega
programme.desc: Molly Mahoney è la goffa e insicura della Bottega delle Meraviglie di Mr. Magorium, il negozio di giocattoli più strano e fantastico del mondo.

programme.title: Il mio piccolo dinosauro
programme.desc: Il giovane Jake cresce in un borgo dove non accade mai nulla di eccitante. Un giorno il ragazzino si ritrova in camera un piccolo dinosauro blu che diventa il suo nuovo meraviglioso amico.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Lute e i suoi amici fantasticano su ciò che potrebbero comprare con il ricavato della vendita di un raro e prezioso Uovo d'Oro di Gargwa e Cheval decide di andare a cercarne uno.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Con i loro scherzi, i gemelli monelli Den-Den e Lin-Lin seminano il panico nel Villaggio di Hakum e si cacciano nei guai addentrandosi di notte nella foresta.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Miss Pink, una venditrice ambulante, si ferma al villaggio, e Navirou si innamora della sua assistente Felyne, Mocha. Quanto oltre si spingerà in nome dell'amore?

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Dan dubita di essere adatto a fare l'allenatore degli aspirati Rider e ripensa al suo vecchio amico Silva, che è sempre stato il migliore in tutto.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Al villaggio arriva un pessimo presagio, il vento solitamente benevolo diventa violento. Hyoro fatica a non deludere le aspettative del suo esigente fratello Genie.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Lidia conduce i suoi amici nella sua foresta per indagare sui sinistri cambiamenti che stanno avvenendo. Lì scopriranno la storia di un leggendario Rider e della famiglia di Lute.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Un Nargacuga infettato dal Flagello Nero attacca il villaggio, lasciando una scia di distruzione, mentre i Rider giovani e anziani fanno il possibile per respingerlo.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Non c'è tempo per rimettere a posto dopo l'attacco del Nargacuga, dato che potrebbe riattaccare il villaggio da un momento all'altro. Cheval giura vendetta e prende un nuovo Monstie.

programme.title: Zip & Zap - Il club delle biglie
programme.desc: Dopo essere stati sorpresi a rubare le risposte del test scolastico, i gemelli Zip e Zap sono costretti per punizione a trascorrere l’estate in un rigido istituto dove è vietato ogni tipo di divertimento.

programme.title: La Mia Prima Barbie: Felice Giorno da Sogno
programme.desc: Canta insieme a Barbie, Barbie, Teresa e Renee in questa avventura musicale mentre pianificano la più grande festa di compleanno a sorpresa di sempre per la sorella di Barbie, Chelsea. "Più grande di UN SEMPLICE compleanno, dobbiamo pianificare un GIORNO DA SOGNO!"

programme.title: Arthur e il popolo dei Minimei
programme.desc: Come un qualsiasi altro bambino di 10 anni, Arthur è affascinato dalle storie che sua nonna gli racconta prima di dormire. I suoi sogni sono popolati dalle tribù africane e dalle incredibili altre invenzioni descritte su un vecchio libro che apparteneva a suo nonno, misteriosamente scomparso.

programme.title: Mr. Magorium e la bottega
programme.desc: Molly Mahoney è la goffa e insicura della Bottega delle Meraviglie di Mr. Magorium, il negozio di giocattoli più strano e fantastico del mondo.

programme.title: Alieni in soffitta
programme.desc: È tempo di vacanze estive per la famiglia Pearson. Cala la notte e improvvisamente quattro oggetti luminosi si dirigono verso il tetto. Un gruppo di alieni è alla conquista della casa.

programme.title: Ploi
programme.desc: Ploi è un pulcino di piviere che ha paura a spiccare il volo.

programme.title: Barbie: Dreamtopia
programme.desc: La sorella più giovane di Barbie, Chelsea, viene iscritta a una gara di biciclette locale dalla sua amica, ma si sente imbarazzata perché non riesce a pedalare senza le rotelle.

programme.title: Air Bud 5: un amico dal tocco magico
programme.desc: Buddy sta portando il suo show nelle spiaggie grazie ad un nuovo sport: il beach volley! La vita in spiaggia non è così rilassante come sembra. Un'ondata di furti misteriosi ha colpito la città e sono state trovate impronte di zampe sulle scene del crimine.

programme.title: Il viaggio di Norm
programme.desc: Norm, un orso bianco vegano e ballerino con la straordinaria capacità di parlare la lingua umana, deve lasciare il Polo Nord per raggiungere New York e fermare lo spietato costruttore Sig.

programme.title: Nocedicocco: Il piccolo drago
programme.desc: Nocedicocco è un draghetto sputafuoco che non ha ancora imparato a volare e che ha anche qualche problema nello sputare il fuoco. L'unico che ha davvero fiducia in lui è il nonno che lo vede come un se stesso giovane. Gli assegna così un compito di responsabilità...

programme.title: Spirito selvaggio
programme.desc: Kacie, una ragazza dallo spirito ribelle, trova uno spirito affine in Blaze, un cavallo da corsa che si rifiuta di essere addomesticato.

programme.title: L'ape Maia il film
programme.desc: Sullo sfondo di una lotta secolare tra api e vespe, la piccola e anticonformista Maia nasce in un alveare dove non è facile essere diversi.

programme.title: Arthur e il popolo dei Minimei
programme.desc: Come un qualsiasi altro bambino di 10 anni, Arthur è affascinato dalle storie che sua nonna gli racconta prima di dormire. programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: I Rider apprendisti vanno via da soli per affrontare il Nargacuga colpito dal Flagello Nero, ma sarà difficile perché il Monstie di Lute è rimasto a casa per riprendersi…

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: È giunto il momento per i giovani Rider di avventurarsi fuori dal Villaggio di Hakum, e questo viaggio è accompagnato da emozione, responsabilità e non poca trepidazione

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Dopo aver iniziato il viaggio fuori dal villaggio, Lute e Navirou si separano dal resto del gruppo e trovano una ragazza ferita e che ha bisogno d'aiuto.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Lute, Navirou, e Avinia incontrano un enigmatico amante degli indovinelli, che si frappone tra loro e l'amato Monstie di Avinia

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Lute e i suoi amici rimangono meravigliati dalla grande città, ma presto devono mettersi all'opera: trovare gli Scribi e trovare un modo per tenere sotto controllo il Flagello Nero.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: È il momento di andare in Missione nella città dei Cacciatori di Gildegaran! Un incarico che sembra essere un gioco da ragazzi si rivela molto più impegnativo di quanto Lute e Navirou avessero pensato

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Lute e Lilia, durante le ricerche di un Cristallo della Fratellanza, si ritrovano in un villaggio di Felyne. Navirou deve affrontare uno strano Felyne che insiste nel dire che sono amici.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Lilia informa i giovani Rider di una missione richiesta dagli Scribi. Devono raggiungere un vasto deserto in cerca di una soluzione al problema del Flagello Nero.

programme.title: Bogus - L'Amico Immaginario

programme.title: Heavy Pumping
programme.desc: Ditch the pre-workout and let the riffs do the heavy lifting. This high-octane blast of speed and power is designed to fuel your gains or ignite a living room mosh pit. High BPMs, crushing drums, and zero excuses.

programme.title: Finnish Metal Special
programme.desc: From the frozen North comes a sound of haunting melodies and raw intensity. Dive into Finland’s finest, where melancholic atmospheres meet the power of the thousand lakes. It’s a masterclass in darkness and ice-cold riffs.

programme.title: The Home of Heavy
programme.desc: Step into the headquarters for everything that shakes the earth. From the pillars of the classics to the pioneers of the new era, this is where the heart of metal beats loudest. This is where you belong.

programme.title: Together We Rise
programme.desc: A tribute to the global brotherhood that refuses to fit in. This collection celebrates the unity that turns fans into a tribe. In this pit, no one stands alone—together, we are the loudest force on earth.

programme.title: Night Time Metal
programme.desc: The sun is down, the filters are off, and the real chaos begins. Brace yourself for the raw, uncensored side of the scene too heavy for daylight. This is the unfiltered truth of the underground. Adult ears only.

programme.title: Info not available
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: Heavy Pumping
programme.desc: Ditch the pre-workout and let the riffs do the heavy lifting. This high-octane blast of speed and power is designed to fuel your gains or ignite a living room mosh pit. High BPMs, crushing drums, and zero excuses.

programme.title: Finnish Metal Special
programme.desc: From the frozen North comes a sound of haunting melodies and raw intensity. Dive into Finland’s finest, where melancholic atmospheres meet the power of the thousand lakes. It’s a masterclass in darkness and ice-cold riffs.

programme.title: The Home of Heavy
programme.desc: Step into the headquarters for everything that shakes the earth. From the pillars of the classics to the pioneers of the new era, this is where the heart of metal beats loudest. This is where you belong.

programme.title: Vito con i suoi S10
programme.desc: Minestra con cipolla e pennette paradiso- Si torna a casa dopo il lavoro e si ha poca voglia di cucinare e pochi ingredienti in frigo? Niente panico, ci pensano i Bicocchi. Pochi semplici ingredienti per un primo piatto veloce e gustoso

programme.title: Giorgione Ricette dal mio libro
programme.desc: Sbriciolata - Ravioli di spinaci. Giorgione dedica un libro e delle ricette ai giovani chef che vogliono cominciare a mettere le mani in pasta, perche' coltivare e cucinare e' un gioco da ragazzi.

programme.title: L'alfabeto di Giorgione St3
programme.desc: N - O - Un modo divertente e diverso di vivere la cucina. Con Giorgione in cattedra l'alfabeto diventa commestibile. Curiosita' e ricette per ogni lettera.

programme.title: Questa terra è la mia terra
programme.desc: Alici - Peppe ci introduce nel mondo del pesce azzurro, in particolare le Alici. Con la mamma realizza delle alici in tortiera. Con l’avanzo fa uno spaghetto di alici alla puttanesca e infine dei paccheri al sushi napoletano.

programme.title: Come è profondo il mare Sardegna
programme.desc: Carlofrote la tonnara - Il viaggio di Gianfranco Pascucci in Sardegna alla scoperta dei luoghi dell'isola, della sua gente, del pesce del suo mare e della cucina tradizionale.

programme.title: L'erba del barone S3
programme.desc: Cicoria e Radicchio - Due piante accomunate da una caratteristica: l’amaro. La cicoria e il radicchio sono piante molto resistenti e che hanno bisogno di poche attenzioni nella coltivazione

programme.title: Beker on tour S31
programme.desc: Grigliata mista all'italiana - Un grande classico della cucina italiana, la grigliata mista, qui con una contaminazione friulana, polenta e formaggio

programme.title: Parola di chef
programme.desc: Il punto di vista di un giovane talento della ristorazione italiana che si racconta svelando le proprie soddisfazioni, difficoltà, aspirazioni, in un percorso tra pubblico e privato.

programme.title: Mangio tutto tranne Singapore
programme.desc: Kampng Glam - La Moschea del Sultano accoglie Giovanni a Kampong Glam, il quartiere arabo, uno dei quartieri più trendy di Singapore, tra street art, negozi di design e tanta cucina tipica.

programme.title: Il gusto di Igles
programme.desc: S11 - La cucina circolare di Igles Corelli è una cucina zero sprechi. Ricette e consigli pratici per una sfruttare al massimo e senza sprechi gli ingredienti.

programme.title: Fuoco Toscana
programme.desc: Verdure a fuoco vivo - Colline, boschi, vigneti. Una natura che accoglie Max e lo invita a cucinare con il fuoco. Un oasi per staccare dalla vita frenetica della città e tornare alle origini.

programme.title: Gambero Rosso
programme.desc: Rubrica

programme.title: Vito con i suoi S9
programme.desc: Pasta al ragu di stinco e bic cupcake - Una ricetta lunga e laboriosa questa proposta oggi da Vito e Roberto. Un ragu di stinco per condire la pasta. La delicata mano di Carlotta per una ricetta dolce e romantica.

programme.title: Giorgione Ricette dal mio libro
programme.desc: Sbriciolata - Ravioli di spinaci. Giorgione dedica un libro e delle ricette ai giovani chef che vogliono cominciare a mettere le mani in pasta, perche' coltivare e cucinare e' un gioco da ragazzi.

programme.title: Let's Brunch

programme.title: Global Street Eats
programme.desc: Chef Dev shares straightforward recipes for street foods that have gained popularity around the world. including Dan Dan Noodles from China. Doner Kebab from Turkey. and Samosas from India.

programme.title: Global Street Eats
programme.desc: Chef Dev is joined by his mom. who helps prepare some of their favorite dishes from a trip they took together through Asia. including Gado Gado Salad from Indonesia. Peanut Pancakes from Malaysia. and Pad Thai from Thailand.

programme.title: Global Street Eats
programme.desc: Chef Dev is joined by his mom, who helps prepare some of their favorite dishes from their travels together around Asia, including Yakisoba Noodles from Japan, Hainanese Chicken Rice from Singapore, and massive Mandu Dumplings from South Korea.

programme.title: Everyday Excellent

programme.title: White Beach: Philippines
programme.desc: Lazing the day away on a white sand beach in the Philippines as the sun gently sets on the horizon.

programme.title: Above the Fiji Islands
programme.desc: Featuring aerial views of remote South Pacific islands, accompanied by nature sounds and ambient music by Relax Moods; offering a mix of ground-level and bird's-eye perspectives through smooth, continuous shots, concluding with a real-time sunset over the sea.

programme.title: Tranquil Marshes: British-Columbia
programme.desc: Nestled in the shadow of the Rockies, the water lilies-covered marshes of Hope, British Columbia, are a sight to behold.

programme.title: Redwood Forest Rain
programme.desc: A one-hour loop of falling rain, filmed in Mount Rainier National Park.

programme.title: Golden Hour in Paradise
programme.desc: A 4K UHD video collage with soft instrumental music from one moment in paradise to the next, with ambient nature sounds and soft music for deep relaxation.

programme.title: Lombok Beaches: Indonesia
programme.desc: Experiencing the beaches of an Indonesian island set to a peaceful soundtrack.

programme.title: Dolphin Voyage Relaxation
programme.desc: Underwater cinematography, a synergistic blend of audio including underwater nature sounds, and calming ambient music combine to induce relaxtion in the deep blue calming ocean with a pod of friendly dolphins.

programme.title: Sparking Patagonia Waves
programme.desc: A cool, refreshing window to the glacial lakeshore of Patagonia's Torres Del Paine National Park, in Chile, all without having to fly 20+ hours, then backpack 20+ miles.

programme.title: Whiritoa Beach, New Zealand
programme.desc: Discover the raw beauty of this secluded New Zealand beach, surrounded by wildflowers.

programme.title: Sunrise Meditation
programme.desc: Easimg into the day with the sound of lapping waves and breathtaking beaches from around the world.

programme.title: Tongariro National Park, New Zealand
programme.desc: Experience the wilderness of New Zealand's oldest national park with raw landscape framed by snow-capped mountains.

programme.title: Coral Kingdom
programme.desc: Arrangements of colorful coral sway to the rhythm of the tide, with aquatic visitors stopping by to enjoy the scenery.

programme.title: Patagonia Mountain Stream
programme.desc: A rejuvenating, refreshing window to the glacial meltwater springs of Chile's Torres Del Paine National Park in Patagonia with this 1-hour long fixed-angle nature relaxation video complete with stereo nature sounds of the creek and birds chirping.

programme.title: North Island's Waterfalls: New Zealand
programme.desc: The North Island region of New Zealand is home to several stunning waterfalls, from tall streams that snake over towering cliffsides to short yet wide plunges of cascading waters.

programme.title: Haast Falls: New Zealand
programme.desc: Haast Pass, the peak home to these roaring falls of melted glacial waters. Mysteriously misty forests, gorgeous nature trails, and local wildlife.

programme.title: Four Seasons Around the World
programme.desc: A kaleidoscopic journey through a shimmering summer, a cozy fall, a breathtaking winter and a glowing spring.

programme.title: Hawaii Beaches: Oahu 1
programme.desc: Escaping to the sandy solitudes of Hawaii's tropical beaches.

programme.title: Pa'ako Beach, Hawaii, U.S
programme.desc: A new day dawns on Hawaii's Pa'ako beach as waves crash on the shore.

programme.title: Moalboal White Beach: Philippines
programme.desc: Exploring the Basdaku Beach.

programme.title: Above the Dolomites
programme.desc: Featuring cinematography by new collaborator Ryan Shirley and synchronized to new healing music by Antonio Resende; offering some views that showcase the Dolomites mountain range.

programme.title: Healing Hawaii II: Oahu
programme.desc: The wonders of Oahu.

programme.title: Cadlao Lagoon: Philippines
programme.desc: Experiencing the beauty of a turquoise lagoon flanked by impressive, vegetation-covered, mountains.

programme.title: Humpback Whales
programme.desc: Observe the humble humpback in all its glory. Few things are more majestic than a whale in its natural habitat: a gentle giant that inhabits every one of the world's oceans.

programme.title: California, U.S
programme.desc: Soar into the golden California sunset on the wings of paragliders.

programme.title: Yellow Wildflowers: France
programme.desc: In the French region of Dordogne, a field of yellow wildflowers grows as far as the eye can see.

programme.title: Above the Rocky Mountains
programme.desc: Showcasing one of the world's most famous mountain ranges, Banff National Park, from a higher perspective and is paired with healing music and subtle real-life nature sounds; soaring over places like Lake Louise and more from the Canadian Rockies.

programme.title: The Tranquil Stream
programme.desc: Take in the peaceful, natural beauty of a Pennsylvania stream. Relax as the melodic water flows downstream cradled in the vibrant tree-covered canopy.

programme.title: Tropical Weightlessness
programme.desc: Gently sway in the tropical turquoise waters with a glimpse of blue sky and palm trees.

programme.title: Healing Hawaii II: Oahu
programme.desc: The wonders of Oahu.

programme.title: Lush Vineyards: Portugal
programme.desc: The jaw-droppingly beautiful Douro Valley, Portugal's most scenic wine regions.

programme.title: Gisborne & Lake Twizel: New Zealand
programme.desc: Taking in Gisborne's tranquil cliff-lined coastlines, driftwood, and rushing waves; going lakeside in the Twizel region to explore snow-covered mountain ranges and the calm surface of the lake waters.

programme.title: Tranquil Tide: Ca'te d'Azur
programme.desc: The medieval town of Menton on the French Côte d'Azur, where the sun glistens on iridescent water.

programme.title: Wonders of New Zealand
programme.desc: A 4K UHD ambient nature film which showcases the beauty of New Zealand's South Island with ambient real-life nature sounds.

programme.title: The Cliff: Costa Rica
programme.desc: Turquoise waters and blue skies as far as the eye can see viewed from atop a cliff.

programme.desc: A remote Indonesian island with breathtaking scenery of various beaches.

programme.title: Kapas Biru Waterfall: Indonesia
programme.desc: Escape to Indonesia with tropical vegetation and a rushing waterfall.

programme.title: SereneScapes
programme.desc: Feeling the wondrous expanse of a spectacular desert surrounded by towering mountain peaks.

programme.title: Rainbow Reef Relaxation 1
programme.desc: Vibrant underwater reefs, including many scenes which no longer look as depicted due to coral bleaching.

programme.title: Diamond Beach II: Indonesia
programme.desc: These shores and accompanying diamond-shaped cliffs are often compared to the idyllic beach scenes of postcards.

programme.title: A Day in Big Sur 2
programme.desc: The beautiful Big Sur coast of California from a unique perspective.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Palermo
programme.desc: Malini Angelica returns to Sicily to explore Palermo, Mondello, and Agrigento. From Palermo’s vibrant markets and rich history to Mondello’s seaside charm and the ancient Greek temples of Agrigento, she uncovers the island’s unique mix of cultures, cuisine, and character that make Sicily truly one of a kind.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: We explore the dramatic castles, prehistoric cave paintings, and prized cuisine of the Dordogne River Valley, with its unforgettable blend of man-made and natural beauty.

programme.title: The Odyssey Journey into Hell
programme.desc: A year has passed. It is time for Odysseus and his men to leave the witch Circe’s island and return to Ithaca. To do so, they must first go to meet the prophet Tiresias in the Underworld. Only he can tell them what to do to appease Poseidon's wrath so that they can return to the seas. But by going to Hell, Odysseus now runs the risk of provoking the almighty Zeus.

programme.title: Madame Butterfly Teatro Alla Scala 2016
programme.desc: In Madama Butterfly (Teatro alla Scala, 2016), a young Japanese woman enters into a marriage with an American naval officer, filled with hope for a new life. As time passes, the contrast between her expectations and reality becomes more profound. The opera unfolds with deep emotional intensity, leading to a powerful and poignant conclusion.

programme.title: CONCERTO - Federico Fellini 100
programme.desc: From the Rai Auditorium in Turin, the Rai National Symphony Orchestra, conducted by Marcello Rota and featuring soprano Cristina Mosca, celebrates 100 years since the birth of Fellini. The concert features iconic soundtracks composed by Nino Rota for Fellini's films, including La Strada, Prova d'orchestra, and Satyricon.

programme.title: Whats On Music Festivals All Over the Med
programme.desc: The Mediterranean comes alive to the sound of music. From Malta high energy Rock the South and sophisticated Malta Jazz Festival, to Italy cutting edge Limbo Festival, Spain forward thinking Sonar Festival, and Turkey classical and contemporary Istanbul Music Festival, every corner of the region vibrates with rhythm, passion, and creativity.

programme.title: Med Nations 08 Egypt
programme.desc: Journey along the northern coast of Egypt, where the Mediterranean meets the land of the pharaohs. From the historic streets and libraries of Alexandria to charming coastal towns and bustling markets, Egypt reveals a unique blend of ancient heritage, vibrant culture, and seaside traditions that continue to shape life along its Mediterranean shores.

programme.title: Outdoor and Nature
programme.desc: OUTDOOR & Nature, a weekly program that highlights sports, outdoor activities, and the breathtaking scenery of Cyprus, will introduce you to the great outdoors. Each episode highlights government initiatives, community organisations, and volunteer efforts to preserve Cyprus's natural heritage while examining nature, wildlife, and conservation. Take a trip of inspiration, exploration, and adventure with hosts Panicos Pilalis and Aristo Aristeidou. Listen and get motivated to go on your own outdoor adventure in Cyprus!

programme.title: Kaštela (U masliniku)
programme.desc: In Kaštela, a cluster of seven towns near Split, winemaking runs deep. Among olive groves and vineyards, Mladen Kuzmanić treated us to local flavors—sipa i bob, pancetta, goat cheese, and homemade sausage—perfectly paired with a glass of regional wine.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Calabria
programme.desc: Malini explores Calabria, a hidden gem in Southern Italy. While its coastal towns like Tropea and Scilla boast turquoise seas, Calabria’s true charm lies in its rural interior, where traditions like handmade pasta, cheese, and salami are still alive. She visits ghost villages like Pentedattilo in the Aspromonte mountains and experiences authentic Calabrian culture, food, and hospitality, hosted by Calabria Etnica.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: We explore the dramatic castles, prehistoric cave paintings, and prized cuisine of the Dordogne River Valley, with its unforgettable blend of man-made and natural beauty.

programme.title: Whats On Rhythms of the Mediterranean
programme.desc: The Mediterranean dances to its own beat. Malta Muzika Muzika showcases national talent, while Italy Nameless Festival delivers international rock and electronic energy. Spain Azkena Rock Festival rocks Vitoria Gasteiz with legendary performances, and Turkey Istanbul Caz Festival blends jazz and local musical traditions. Discover how Mediterranean rhythms echo across genres, generations, and cultures.

programme.title: Makarska
programme.desc: In Makarska, where the Biokovo mountain meets the sea, we explored local flavors with chef Mario Tomaš. On the menu: "utisno" shark, a Venetian-influenced specialty, and njokada—a cinnamon-spiced twist on pašticada.

programme.title: Med Nations 14 Cyprus
programme.desc: Cyprus, an island where Mediterranean sunshine meets rich history. From the ancient streets of Nicosia to idyllic coastal villages, Cyprus reveals a unique blend of culture, cuisine, and seaside traditions shaped by centuries of Mediterranean life.

programme.title: Med Destinations Delos
programme.desc: Step into the myth and mystery of Delos with Med Destinations. This tiny island, rich in archaeological wonders and legendary tales, offers a unique glimpse into Greece’s ancient past amid stunning coastal vistas.

programme.title: Colours of Mediterranean Culture
programme.desc: From Malta to Greece, Mediterranean arts flourish. Valletta Baroque Festival, Malta International Arts Festival, and Birgu by Candlelight light up the island with music and heritage. Italy’s Cortona on the Move, La Fenice in Piazza San Marco, and Mercantia Festival showcase photography, opera, and street performance. France’s Art Paris and International Garden Festival, Spain’s Revela’t Festival and La Leyenda de Tartessos, Portugal’s Umbrella Sky Project and Walk & Talk Biennale, Turkey’s Istanbul Theatre Festival and Biennial, and Greece’s Athens & Epidaurus Festival highlight the Med’s rich artistic tapestry.

programme.title: Gold Cuisine EP 13
programme.desc: Embrace the joy of homemade comfort. Bombes, the golden Cypriot sweet fried dough pastries with a crispy exterior and a fluffy interior, are prepared by Chryso Lefou. She continues with a potato au gratin that has been baked to perfection for a rich, savoury finish, and is layered with cold cuts and cheese. A delightful combination of hearty indulgence and sweet tradition.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: With its thought-provoking sights, delicious cuisine, and idyllic coastline, it's no wonder Normandy is both a Mecca for history buffs and a popular getaway for Parisians.

programme.title: Med Destinations Pula
programme.desc: Discover Pula, Croatia, with Med Destinations. Famous for its Roman amphitheater and charming old town, Pula combines historical grandeur with Adriatic seaside beauty.

programme.title: Med Destinations Rimini
programme.desc: Med Destinations visits Rimini, Italy’s seaside gem, where golden beaches meet rich history. From Roman ruins to vibrant nightlife, Rimini offers the perfect mix of culture and coastal charm.

programme.title: Blockchain in Real Estate Panel
programme.desc: As blockchain moves from theory to practice, this panel examines its growing role in real estate. Speakers unpack how decentralised systems are changing transactions, ownership records, and trust, while addressing the challenges of regulation, scalability, and industry readiness in today’s market.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Here along the Côte d’Azur, we wander the sunlit promenades of Nice, catch whispers of fortunes changing hands at Monaco’s famed casino, and step inside the elegant villas once home to artists and heiresses.

programme.title: Whats on Food and Culinary Delights
programme.desc: Taste the Mediterranean this week on Whats On. Malta celebrates with Festa Frawli, the Malta International Food Festival, and Festival Ikel Malti. Slovenia serves fine dining at Gourmet Ljubljana, while Italy CousCous Festival blends flavors and cultures. Join us as we explore street food, markets, and culinary workshops that highlight the region rich gastronomic heritage.

programme.title: Med Destinations Ios
programme.desc: Discover the lively spirit and scenic beauty of Ios on Med Destinations. From crystal-clear beaches to winding streets and sunset views, Ios combines vibrant island life with the tranquility of the Aegean Sea.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Ramadan
programme.desc: Malini Angelica visits Morocco during Ramadan, the holiest month for Muslims. She joins locals in Marrakech and the Berber village of Imlil for the traditional Iftar meal, the breaking of the fast. Experiencing Morocco during Ramadan offers a special glimpse into its rich culture and traditions, as the country comes alive with community, spirituality, and celebration.

programme.title: Sinj
programme.desc: Sinj blends courage, tradition, and warm hospitality—reflected even in its food. Edo Crljen welcomed us with a bold serving of tripes, while Ankica Vlastelica prepared the town’s pride: arambaši, Sinj’s iconic stuffed cabbage rolls you simply can’t leave without tasting.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Naples is Italy in the extreme. We’ll prowl backstreet fish markets and dodge speedy Vespas before indulging in pizza where it was invented. Afterward, we'll climb to the top of nearby Mount Vesuvius, then wander through the ruins of Pompeii, the Roman town it destroyed.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Milan
programme.desc: Malini Angelica visits Milan, in northern Italy’s Lombardy region. Known for its chic style, stunning architecture, delicious food, and world-class art, Milan stands out as one of Europe’s most fashionable and sophisticated cities.

programme.title: Il Provinciale
programme.desc: Federico Quaranta travels to San Vito Lo Capo in Sicily, retracing the footsteps of Saracen pirates who once haunted the Mediterranean. Amid coastal landscapes and historical echoes, the journey explores local traditions shaped by centuries of cultural exchange. Couscous, legends, and sea stories bring the spirit of Sicily’s past vividly to life.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Discover the wonders of southern France as we savor Roman ruins in Nîmes, a papal palace in Avignon, Van Gogh's vivid views in Arles, and the vineyards of the Côtes du Rhône.

programme.title: The Odyssey on Odysseus Trail
programme.desc: Ten years after the sack of Troy, Zeus is alone on Olympus, with only his daughter Athena remaining at his side. She tries to convince her father to help Odysseus, the last Greek fighter who has not yet returned home to Ithaca.

programme.title: Concerto – OSN Gatti Bruckner Wagner Torino
programme.desc: In January 2022, Daniele Gatti conducted the Orchestra Sinfonica Nazionale della Rai at the Turin Auditorium, performing Wagner’s "Parsifal" excerpts and Bruckner’s Symphony No. 9. The programme highlighted Wagner's meditative Prelude to Act III and Good Friday Spell, followed by Bruckner’s profound Ninth Symphony, marked by its emotional depth and unfinished final movement.

programme.title: Brač (Supetar)
programme.desc: On Brač, famed for its white stone, Zlatni Rat beach, and Vidova Gora, we stopped in Supetar to taste tradition. Restaurateur Teo Dragičević served us šporka juha, mišanca, and vitalac—authentic island flavors rooted in Brač’s rich culinary heritage.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Basque
programme.desc: Malini Angelica visits San Sebastián, Spain’s Basque Country, exploring its unique culture, history, and world-renowned cuisine. She goes on a pintxo crawl, visits La Concha beach, nearby towns like Getaria and Zarautz for local specialties, experiences a traditional txoko, and ends with Semana Grande fireworks.

programme.desc: As property markets evolve, the laws governing ownership and transfer must evolve with them. This panel investigates how legal structures can protect buyers and investors without slowing progress, and what reforms are needed to ensure efficient, transparent, and future-ready property transfer across the Mediterranean.
